title: Save Generated Test Cases to the Project Repository
description: Verifies that a user can save the generated test cases to a specific project repository so they persist and are accessible from the project dashboard.
expected_result: The generated test cases are saved to the 'E-Commerce Platform QA' project. A 'Test cases saved successfully' notification is displayed. The test cases are accessible from the project's test case repository.

test_steps.action: Navigate to the test case generator page

test_steps.expected: Test cases are generated and displayed

test_steps.action: Wait for the results to appear
Select the project 'E-Commerce Platform QA' from the save-to project dropdown
test_steps.expected: Project 'E-Commerce Platform QA' is selected as the save destination

test_steps.action: Click the Save Test Cases button
test_steps.expected: Test cases are saved and a success notification appears

test_steps.action: Verify the success notification message text
test_steps.expected: Notification confirms test cases were saved to the project
